objective: Map the current project artifacts to App Store Connect, Google Play Console, and domestic Android store submission fields so the remaining owner inputs, production evidence, native builds, screenshots, privacy forms, and review access can be closed without storing secrets in the repository.

officialBasis.name: Apple App Store Connect app information
officialBasis.requirement: App information, localizations, support, privacy, age rating, build, screenshots, review details, and availability must be completed in App Store Connect before submission.

officialBasis.name: Apple App Review Guidelines
officialBasis.requirement: Submitted apps must provide useful functionality, accurate metadata, review access, privacy disclosures, and any needed special instructions.

officialBasis.name: Apple App Privacy Details
officialBasis.requirement: Privacy answers must identify data collected by the app and integrated third-party partners and must stay accurate when practices change.

officialBasis.name: Apple app previews and screenshots
officialBasis.requirement: Screenshots should come from the real app experience and match the submitted app version.

officialBasis.name: Google Play create and set up your app
officialBasis.requirement: Google Play setup requires store listing, contact details, category, declarations, content rating, app content, release, and review material.

officialBasis.name: Google Play Data safety
officialBasis.requirement: Data safety answers must disclose collected and shared data, security practices, purposes, and deletion support.

officialBasis.name: Google Play app access credentials
officialBasis.requirement: Apps with restricted functionality must provide credentials or instructions that let Google reviewers access the restricted areas.

officialBasis.name: Google Play preview assets
officialBasis.requirement: Preview assets, feature graphic, screenshots, and store listing media must meet Play Console format and content rules.

requiredBeforeSubmission: Apple Developer team and App Store Connect app record
App name, subtitle, category, age rating, support URL, privacy URL
Final legal pages and Apple App Privacy answers
Review contact and demo account instructions
Google Play developer account and app record
App name, short description, full description, category, support email, privacy URL
Final Google Data safety and app access instructions
Android App Bundle uploaded and signed through Play App Signing
Google Play phone screenshots and feature graphic
Content rating, target audience, ads declaration, and data deletion answers
ICP filing and APP filing information
Channel-specific privacy, permission, SDK, and AI-generated content disclosures
Signed Android package and domestic screenshots
Support contact and filing display location

Final app names and developer account ownership are confirmed.

Signing keys, certificates, profiles, or keystores
Private console screenshots containing account or payment details
